user.title: Ecobee (community fork)
user.description:
Sign in with your ecobee.com account.

This fork bypasses ecobee's shut-down developer portal by signing you in through ecobee's web login, the same way ecobee.com does. If your account has two-factor authentication enabled, complete the 2FA prompt that appears in the ecobee login page during the sign-in chain - Auth0 handles MFA inline, no extra HA step needed.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Ecobee
reauth_confirm.description: The session for {username} has expired. Enter your password to refresh it.

mfa_code.title: Two-factor verification
mfa_code.description: Enter the verification code from your {challenge_label} for {username}.

error.mfa_invalid_code: That code didn't match. Try again.
error.mfa_expired: Your verification session expired. Re-enter your email and password to start over.
error.auth0_unreachable: Could not reach auth.ecobee.com. Check the HA host's outbound network/DNS.
error.auth0_step_authorize: Auth0 /authorize step failed - the universal-login entry point did not accept our request. Check Settings -> System -> Logs for the 'Ecobee auth: step=authorize' line.
error.auth0_step_login_form: Auth0 login form (identifier or password) returned an unexpected response. Check the HA log for 'POST .../login/' lines.
error.auth0_step_resume: Auth0 /authorize/resume step failed - login appeared to succeed but the resume redirect was malformed. Check the HA log for 'Ecobee auth: step=resume' lines.
error.auth0_step_custom_prompt: Auth0 surfaced a prompt page (T&C, MFA setup, profile completion) that requires interactive action. Sign in to ecobee.com from a browser, complete any pending step, then retry the integration setup.
error.auth0_redirect: Auth0 returned an unexpected redirect. Check the HA log for 'Ecobee auth:' lines.
error.code_exchange: Auth0 accepted login but rejected the token exchange (PKCE mismatch?). Check the HA log for the full traceback.
error.internal: Unexpected error. Check Settings -> System -> Logs for the full traceback.
